info.title: dotnet outdated
info.description: A .NET Core global tool to update project dependencies.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(Boolean), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String, Boolean), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String, Boolean))

options.name: --include-auto-references
options.description: Specifies whether to include auto-referenced packages.

options.name: --pre-release
options.description: Specifies whether to look for pre-release versions of packages. Possible values: Auto (default), Always or Never.

options.name: --version-lock
options.description: Specifies whether the package should be locked to the current Major or Minor version. Possible values: None (default), Major or Minor.

options.name: --transitive
options.description: Specifies whether it should detect transitive dependencies.

options.name: --transitive-depth
options.description: Defines how many levels deep transitive dependencies should be analyzed. Integer value (default = 1)

options.name: --upgrade
options.description: Specifies whether outdated packages should be upgraded. Possible values for <TYPE> is Auto (default) or Prompt.

options.name: --fail-on-updates
options.description: Specifies whether it should return a non-zero exit code when updates are found.

options.name: --include
options.description: Specifies to only look at packages where the name contains the provided string. Culture and case insensitive. If provided multiple times, a single match is enough to include a package.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Specifies to only look at packages where the name does not contain the provided string. Culture and case insensitive. If provided multiple times, a single match is enough to exclude a package.

options.name: --output
options.description: Specifies the filename for a generated report. (Use the -of|--output-format option to specify the format. JSON by default.)

options.name: --output-format
options.description: Specifies the output format for the generated report. Possible values: json (default) or csv.

options.name: --older-than
options.description: Only include package versions that are older than the specified number of days.

options.name: --no-restore
options.description: Add the reference without performing restore preview and compatibility check.

arguments.name: Path
arguments.description: The path to a .sln, .csproj or .fsproj file, or to a directory containing a .NET Core solution/project. If none is specified, the current directory will be used.
